notes: Just a few tiny mouse issues, just click in another window before clicking in the game again if the mouse cursor goes out of the game window, then all is fine !
title: Ultimate Epic Battle Simulator

notes:
game ran after i removed the "nod3d11" tag i had set up from testing last time, i've gone from playing this game on a gtx 1050 on windows 10, to a r270, as far as i can tell this card is mostly better, but i'm not quite getting the same FPS as the gtx (i'd average a measly 8fps, (with 50,000 zombies across one of the city maps.)
now the game struggles to hold that with probably around 2000 entities on screen.
it could be the graphics card swap (windforce oc 2x), but the game seems to struggle with pathfinding a lot more too.
on average in other games, i get similar or slightly higher fps, making this the oddball.
title: Ultimate Epic Battle Simulator

notes:
Gave up on this game a few months ago. I tried it again with the latest proton version and suddenly it just started working, at medium settings I got the same performance as native windows. Although one thing I did differently this time around was make sure I had all the recommended drivers installed i.e Vulkan. Not sure if this had anything to do with it. Anyway works for me perfect.
